questionText: Qual é a forma gramaticalmente correta para completar a frase: 'By the time their parents arrived, the children _______ asleep for hours'?
Ao descrever a relação de um filho com seus pais em inglês, qual preposição se usa corretamente em: 'He takes _______ his father in many ways'?
Qual é a forma verbal correta para completar: 'She wishes she _______ more time with her grandparents before they passed away'?
Qual artigo completa corretamente a frase: 'She is _______ only child in her family'?
Em contexto familiar, qual forma verbal está correta em: 'My parents _______ married for over forty years'?
Qual preposição completa corretamente: 'He fell _______ love with her the moment they met at the family reunion'?
Qual forma do verbo 'raise' está correta em: 'Her grandparents _______ her after her parents divorced'?
Qual pronome reflexivo está correto em: 'The couple _______ to each other for better or worse'?
Qual é o uso correto do genitivo saxônico em: 'The house belongs to my sister and her husband — it is _______'?
Qual estrutura está correta para expressar obrigação passada: 'She _______ told her mother the truth years ago'?
Qual forma verbal é gramaticalmente correta em: 'If only my brother _______ me more often — we live so far apart'?
Qual é a construção correta ao falar sobre duas irmãs: 'Neither of the sisters _______ willing to compromise'?
Qual forma de comparative está correta em: 'The older twin is _______ responsible than the younger one'?
Qual opção completa corretamente a frase: 'My aunt, _______ I have always admired, passed away last year'?
Qual modal exprime a dedução correta em: 'She _______ be his daughter — they look exactly alike'?
Qual forma está correta em: 'The couple decided to _______ their differences for the sake of their children'?
Qual é a forma correta do past perfect continuous para completar: 'They _______ together for a decade before they decided to get married'?
Qual construção de inversão é gramaticalmente correta ao expressar condição hipotética sobre relacionamento: '_______ she told him the truth sooner, they might still be together'?
Qual opção completa corretamente a frase com subjuntivo: 'The family therapist insisted that he _______ his wife's feelings'?
Qual estrutura com 'as' está gramaticalmente correta ao descrever semelhanças familiares: 'She is _______ her mother was at her age — remarkably independent'?
Ao expressar um pedido formal no contexto de relacionamentos, qual construção está correta: 'He proposed that the family _______ the matter at the next meeting'?
Qual forma participial absoluta está correta em: '_______ such a close family bond, they rarely argued about serious matters'?
Qual é a construção correta com gerúndio em posição de sujeito: '_______ a child through adoption requires great emotional commitment'?
Qual modal exprime probabilidade passada ao falar sobre relações familiares: 'He _______ resented his brother's success — they stopped speaking without explanation'?
Qual estrutura de ênfase (cleft sentence) está correta: '_______ was her grandmother who taught her the true meaning of resilience'?
Qual construção passiva está gramaticalmente correta em: 'Their marriage _______ by cultural expectations for decades'?
Qual forma correta do reported speech completa: 'She told him that she _______ him if he changed his mind'?
Qual construção com 'wish' está correta para expressar arrependimento sobre o passado familiar: 'He wishes his father _______ more encouraging when he was young'?
Qual forma nominal de 'estrangement' está usada corretamente em: 'The _______ from his family lasted nearly two decades before reconciliation'?
Qual construção apositiva está corretamente pontuada: 'My cousin _______ a brilliant surgeon, lives abroad'?
Qual é a forma correta de concord (concordância) em: 'Each of the siblings _______ a distinct role within the family dynamic'?
Qual é a estrutura correta com 'no sooner' em narrativa sobre relacionamentos: 'No sooner _______ they married than the problems began'?
Qual construção correta com 'used to' ou 'would' está gramaticalmente adequada: 'As children, they _______ spend summers at their grandmother's farm'?
Qual é a forma correta do infinitivo perfeito em: 'He claimed _______ his estranged daughter years before the reunion'?
Qual preposição está correta em: 'She was brought _______ by her maternal grandparents after her parents' early death'?
Qual estrutura de condicional misto está correta ao refletir sobre decisões familiares: 'If they _______ more carefully, they might be living together now'?
Qual construção de 'so...that' está correta em nível nativo: 'The feud between the two families had gone on _______ long that no one remembered how it had started'?
Qual é a forma correta da construção de adjunto participial em: '_______ from three generations of divorce, the therapist noted a clear intergenerational pattern'?
Qual é a construção gramaticalmente correta com 'hardly...when' em narrativa sobre relacionamentos: 'Hardly _______ she arrived home when the argument resumed'?
Qual é a forma mais precisa ao nível nativo de C2 para completar: 'The siblings' rivalry, _______ deep-rooted as it was, eventually gave way to mutual respect'?
Qual construção com 'were to' expressa corretamente condição hipotética formal: 'If they _______ separate, the children would suffer most'?
Qual estrutura nominal está correta em: 'The _______ of their parents' expectations weighed heavily on both siblings throughout their adult lives'?
Qual é a forma correta do subjuntivo nominal com 'it is essential': 'It is essential that every family member _______ heard during the mediation session'?
Qual forma pronominal relativa é gramaticalmente correta em: 'Her father, _______ opinion she had always valued, surprisingly supported her decision to divorce'?
Qual construção enfática com inversão está correta em: '_______ until she had children of her own did she truly understand her mother's sacrifices'?
Qual estrutura de ellipsis está gramaticalmente precisa ao nível nativo C2: 'His brother reconciled with the family sooner than he _______'?
Qual forma da voz passiva com verbos de percepção está correta: 'The tension between the siblings _______ to have been building for years before the confrontation'?
Qual construção com 'as if / as though' segue a norma prescritiva nativa ao nível C2: 'He spoke to his elderly parents _______ they were strangers'?
Qual é a construção correta de 'have something done' em contexto familiar: 'They _______ the family home renovated before their parents' golden anniversary'?
Qual estrutura de 'whatever / however' adverbial está correta em: '_______ difficult the circumstances, she remained devoted to her ailing parents'?
Qual opção completa corretamente com a estrutura 'the + comparative...the + comparative': '_______ more time they spent apart, the more they began to appreciate each other'?
